payload.title: Cloud auth: OIDC login + JWT/refresh sessions
payload.description: Stand up hosted interactive login via OIDC (GitHub/Google/Apple) with optional email+password fallback. Mint short-lived JWT access tokens carrying sub + project/role claims, plus long-lived rotating refresh tokens; expose refresh + logout/revoke. Principal is always the human account. Web and iOS both consume this path. (From SCP-122 design.)
